name: Gnasher McChaos, Mayor of Whateverville
text:
When Gnasher McChaos enters the battlefield, each player rolls a six-sided die. The lowest roller is your Campaign Volunteer until your next turn and really ought to top off your drink.
Whenever you roll one or more dice, Gnasher McChaos gets +1/+0 until end of turn, then flip a coin. If you win the flip, roll one of those dice again.
{1}{R}, Roll a six-sided die: 1 — sacrifice Gnasher, it's been a long term. 2, 3, 4, or 5 — Gnasher McChaos deals that much damage to any target. 6 — take an extra turn after this one and say "re-elected!" out loud.
flavorText: He ran unopposed. Mostly because nobody else filed the paperwork in time.
